ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group (e.g., 3-4 years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "target_age" INTEGER /* Average target age in years for the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in years for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in years for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line (e.g., Casual Wear, Formal Wear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product line (e.g., Boys, Girls, Unisex) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product line is currently active or discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group the chart is for */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line the chart is for */,
  "chart_version" TEXT /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the chart was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the chart was last updated */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is for international standards */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Current approval status of the size chart (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the size chart */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the size chart was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement detail */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the detail belongs to */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., Height, Chest, Waist, Hip, Inseam) */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement (e.g., 99 - 104 cm, 56 cm) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "is_range" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement value is a range */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the measurement range */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the measurement range */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_details_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_details_measurement_type FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., Height, Chest, Waist, Hip, Inseam) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is required for the size chart */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the version is for */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the comment is for */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., suggestion, correction, query) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_comments_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production, quality assurance, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Design, Production, Quality Assurance) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, approve) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the file */,
  "file_author" TEXT /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_files_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the metadata is for */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the size chart (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "international_standard" TEXT /* International standard the size chart adheres to (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metadata was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the metadata was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metadata is public or private */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the metadata */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_metadata_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)
